title: Minerally
description: Expands types of ores in minecraft! Ore piles, crystals, geodes and mineral rocks.
body:
**Minerally**

Mod adds ore piles, crystals, geodes and mineral rocks!

Which need to be mined several times, except for mineral rocks/geodes.

Generated in caves, in deepslate caves and in the Nether.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MThpkFzgCGI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Crystal Showcase:**

*(ore piles will work the same)*

![show](https://imgur.com/c2T6Fim.gif) 

**#Future:**

~~1. Add ore piles (iron, gold, copper, coal) and maybe more crystals (redstone, lapis).~~

~~2. And small stones of these ores.~~

**3.** Support for other ore mods |maybe|

~~4. 1.20 Port.~~

 [Requires Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
